KAZAKHSTAN IN THE HANDS OF THE PEOPLE

The president and prime minister have fled the country. The government has collapsed. Soldiers and military personnel are also trying to escape the country or risk arrest by protesters. Demonstrators have seized control of airport roads and are also detaining police officers who do not join them. Politicians are being arrested. Healthcare workers at vaccination centers (nurses and doctors) are also being detained. Protesters are armed and have seized arsenals. Politicians' homes are on fire.

The unrest began when people were no longer able to withdraw money from banks without a vaccination passport and QR code.

**INTERNATIONAL MEDIA IS LYING, CLAIMING PEOPLE WERE OUTRAGED BY FUEL PRICE HIKE**	 verdict: ['False information.']
